title: Improved Documentation and Logging for Groups/Teams
excerpt:
Would love to have an activity log for a team. Who created it, last activity, where it is used, etc.  Its very easy to create a group or team and they can get out of hand quickly. 
Also a mandatory description for a team…

posts.author: cldeluna (CLAUDIA DE LUNA)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would love to have an activity log for a team. Who created it, last activity, where it is used, etc. Its very easy to create a group or team and they can get out of hand quickly.
Also a mandatory description for a team.
